span.p: Component View: Browser Memory Daemon - WSL Loopback HTTP Daemon

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Routes health and audit work
to

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Routes loopback API requests,
serves UI assets, enforces
bearer auth for memory/admin
APIs, and applies CORS for
allowed origins.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Reports health, DB integrity,
FTS consistency, runtime
paths, storage counts, media
queue status, and writes
metadata-only audit events.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Durable relational and
full-text store for sources,
documents, visits, visit
events, snapshots, chunks,
chunks_fts, media artifacts,
media fetch tasks, policy
rules, audit events, and
deletion receipts.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Filesystem store for snapshot
text blobs under WSL XDG data
paths.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Bounded and disposable
filesystem cache for stored
image/video/audio blobs with
purge/rehydrate semantics
that preserve media refs,
hashes, status reasons, and
provenance when bytes are
absent or purged.
